steps.title: Find the plural subject
steps.content: The verb in the blank belongs to the subject the various cultural and ideological frameworks. That subject is plural, even though singular nouns such as idea and person appear nearby.

steps.title: Make the verb agree
steps.content: A is singular, B is singular and unnecessarily progressive, and D is singular perfect progressive. The sentence needs the plural present-tense verb that agrees with frameworks and states a general relationship. The answer is C.
